h0f52a288g6b9ag42e9gbdf1gb6aab3654c74: Don't forget our little agreement. As soon as things quiet down here...
he14de324g9347g4805g8f7ag3761d2597533: I already got my answer. Let's not make this awkward.
h4ea91634ge98dg4b2bga63agc989de4ef829: Enjoy the rest of your night. But maybe do it elsewhere.
h96a7f25agc3bbg4de0g8f48ge373dd5a1d61: Best hope all this wine makes me forget what you tried to do.
hbc1b57b5g9532g4901g983bga463e2b8d25a: We should've had wine more often. More warming than the fire.
hcaccd9bdg85ddg4adcg8067ge1f824212c6d: Everyone seems to be in high spirits.
h05f84a79ga7a3g4511gb308g5f86b4ef948a: Strange... you know who I never thought I'd find myself caring for?
h187df1e1g9288g4ac1g9224g2ea7e78e7e58: Exactly right. Never gave you all much thought. Certainly not that bunch in the grove.
h656bbd29g0b60g4a66g8699g763bab5244a8: Exactly right. Never gave them much thought. Certainly not that bunch in the grove.
hc546cc22g4480g45b5gb5dfg3c47929e9d88: Your words, not mine. But not what I mean.
ha9429a66gf218g41e5gb05egdd601741d394: I mean tieflings. Never gave you all much thought. Certainly not that bunch in the grove.
hce7aa1c5g07f9g465cg9a67gb0fe6b7e35fa: Yet we came through for them. We saved their lives. Odd.
hcb4f13c7g2faag4e7ag8492gd3ab64f40836: Not so odd. We did the right thing.
h67e7aaddgecc5g4a50gb5edg8a0ee697c294: That's more easily said by some than others.
h4b0641ceg15f2g4f73gb98eg44cf59b39a00: But nobody's here to debate right from wrong.
h26d168b7g46c9g4075ga7begd3d0babbe32d: I won't keep you long - I gather you've already made plans with someone for your evening.
h08e458fdg6c8ag4b7cga3b1ge47fef16e11a: Maybe those plans could change, for the right person...
h43d7aef2gb7feg490bgb6feg676cc6d2d9f2: *Shadowheart says nothing, but the glimmer of interest in her eyes is unmistakeable.*
h0a2bf7cdg64acg45dbg835dgbc4f9fb108dc: I'll find you later, once the camp's asleep.
hce15448cgbad4g4055g8b17g0dec4b01f6e6: Best not keep me waiting. I'd prefer not to entertain myself...
hecdfbdb5gf1b2g4d8bgb3c1g6b068995984f: I don't suppose you'd consider some sort of shared arrangement?
h42bb71c6gf422g49begb7b6g4de3b96a1967: On second thought, perhaps not. I should honour my other arrangement.
hd43ec76eg384eg40eegbcf5gc016e5ce6666: As you like. Try not to tire yourself out too much.
hb76b2baegbfaag4d53g9669g6296047ff9eb: I've arranged some... company, yes. It could be a long evening.
hd08e0e30ge1beg4ccdg8815g3b31a182b7ff: There - some liquid courage. And try to get some rest too if you can; tomorrow's another day.
hc0d17232gebffg419eg8b84g793be6b29849: We should wait a little while. Until the others have drifted off.
h1a94a43ag59beg4108g8ac4g92fdeab14f58: I'll find you after everyone's turned in for the night.
h49bd3532g3221g44a1g8fc3g2fc80430a71b: Not keen on sharing with the others?
h02bc3cbcgf771g47a7g894dg89f9210c8f52: Just a bottle. I think you have other plans afterwards - wouldn't want to keep you.
h2693edd6g8104g4915g9c7bg2d4135e3e07c: ... well, maybe I would. But first come, first served.
h68ad96c4g57d8g4591gb6f4g2c8001e0379b: It's quite a bottle. I liberated one of the finer vintages earlier.
h7b59e8b4g137cg498ag8132g9ff6ce12a17a: Best enjoyed someplace private, I think.
h17ee06beg02bdg4422gbfaagde4450279158: *Shadowheart trails off and glances around at the party. She turns back to you, mildly surprised you're still there.*
hf79785a4g517cg4d87gae10g8f4cec8a1cd5: I thought you might've wanted to mingle with the others.
h27ecd8e1gffe7g4e69g9568g8980af20dbb6: Are you trying to get rid of me?
hbe119784g9911g4893ga0feg7fb7e919eada: No, but I thought you might be keen to get away from me. We haven't always seen eye to eye, after all.
h1e670c59gd76fg4aacgb6cfg5a39e869ab1e: Besides, I'm sure there's plenty of people who'll be keen to celebrate most thoroughly with you.
h37a09ad4g31f0g44ffgb8d6g02371c147b14: I mean you saved the grove. I'm sure you'll find you're quite popular, if you look around.
h30f938daga7e2g4aa1g9e8cg5bf6ae2a6272: You sure about that? Maybe they dislike me as much as you do.
heb1eaceeg1389g4c83g9296ga6e0c4584cde: You're putting words in my mouth - I never said I disliked you. It's just we have some work to do, to get on each other's good sides.
hca14b404g3c5fg40a8g8e47ga5ea5c4ddd25: And yes, I'm sure there's someone out there for you. Gale's been stealing a glance or three in your direction...
h3caf47cbgd236g4ac8gab61gd0418b823ccd: Maybe I'd like to celebrate with you...
h7b1e0231g8707g4c28g8693g700eb1247f58: Maybe you would. But I'm not cruel enough to get your hopes up. In spite of what some might believe...
hd02de32egef11g43afga296gd6ba55710655: I think I could win you over, if I wanted.
h7af8bdcag6f24g4417g893fg1befd9bfa2e0: Oh you do, do you? I'm not some dewy-eyed tiefling maiden you just saved - you'll need to do a lot more leg-work before I commit to any hip-work.
h5ea478bdg221ag4563gb3e6gc06932a4b2c8: I see. So that no is final...?
h22613a66ge534g4f63g8844g23d5728ee00f: For now. Don't worry, there'll be plenty of fun for you tonight. Just not in my tent.
hf8905bdbg848bg4a67g8f6fg493a1cff4ab4: I understand. Before I go... how can we see eye to eye?
h1d0b47c2g52f6g498bgbfdcgbb281ea3e7fb: What, some advice on how to make me more bearable? All right, if you like...
h38464fb9g9584g4dedg83c3gc87eddef82fc: Respect my mission, my beliefs, keep us focused on finding a cure...
h57855352g5a53g4d4agac9cg088edbbbcc55: If you do that, well... I see no reason why we shouldn't get closer.
h6efe3866g5fe2g4434g86e1g6811c2ee53e8: But enough about me. I saw Wyll looking at you. I bet he'd like a word, or more...
hc15ebbdcgbdd4g4b4fg873eg88ccf6499f04: Now enough about me. Haven't you seen the way Gale's been stealing looks at you? Go on, see if he wants something, or someone...
h6fbff388gc5efg4967g959eg3d51d707a0c0: Now enough about me. Did you see the way Astarion's been looking at you? Hungry in more ways than usual, maybe. Go on, you know what to do...
hb2fae107g102ag47cbg9381gc0aafa2b33c1: Enough about me. I saw Lae'zel looking at you a little less murderously than usual. Go on, you know what to do...
h380ee330gd427g40ffg9b99g9693781c29f3: Now enough about me. You should go see who'd like to spend the night with the saviour of the grove...
h463137cfg74eeg4873g9f7agba3762fbfae5: I'm not half as mysterious as you might think. Respect my privacy, my beliefs, keep us focused on finding a cure...
h5806cf5bga8a0g46bfga5a1g718a483dcd55: I'm not half as mysterious as you might think. Respect my privacy, my opinion, keep us focused on finding a cure...
h441c52a6g941fg4e4bg9ec7g2d6fd2792f9d: In that case, I'll leave you to enjoy your evening.
h8e684d66g2545g4922g9df8g60d343e91d84: Have fun... and don't be a stranger.
hb5343639g1a2ag41fdgad13g72ad512c43bc: You're not that bad, no. You might pretend to be that bad from time to time...
h39abe63bg376ag4307gad60gd316df0b48d9: Why I've no idea of what you mean...
hcbcca3b3gf8aeg4bb9gaa62gd938aa7c30ac: Now, on you go. And happy hunting.
hb2ac3a99g6f7cg4de6gb04bgd7fbfd1367ff: You sure about that? There's a cruel streak in you, I think.
h7137f2b9g5e65g41bfg845eg751735666715: Keep prodding, and maybe you'll find out for certain.
h51ff0d2eg1ec1g48edg8e7dge06f864f548f: Now that you mention it... thanks for the tip. Enjoy your evening.
h42e8946dg3400g49a5gbfabg372b739fc1ff: I will, but not as much as you'll enjoy yours, I'm betting...
h15ec7a28g6e91g455agb09fg4d12ac6f5dd3: And yes, I'm sure there's someone out there for you. You should have seen the look Wyll was giving you earlier...
h8ccfacafg7265g428cga3dag9f88a75fd010: And yes, I'm sure there's someone out there for you. I saw the way Astarion's been stealing glances at you. Hungry in more ways than usual, maybe.
he36cb7d6g3eb4g4c21gad9bg40911366b221: And yes, I'm sure there's someone out there for you. Lae'zel for example - I saw her looking at you a little less murderously than usual.
hc7422d2ag6fa2g428ag97c7g25dd5e1b9920: And yes, I'm sure there's someone out there for you. You should go see who'd like to spend the night with the saviour of the grove...
h46c22658ga2ccg46a5gb441g789f2ed411e3: There'll be time for that later.
h65a511c3g8dfcg40c3g9de9g0bd2b357f037: True. But I thought you might not want to linger with me. We haven't always seen eye to eye, after all.
hf02f6862g13b7g4896gaee4g414a6a4c8c96: You're all the company I need right now.
hc8b347d3g6e4cg4361g81b1g9c7831b8e9c9: That so? I won't pretend I'm not surprised... we haven't always seen eye to eye, after all.
h4114e587g2713g4724gaa07g4bfa0cb78c8f: I suppose I should. Enjoy your evening.
hf206d9d0g1a3dg49d8g90fcgeda5bc529faf: I'd rather enjoy this wine on my own, so... find your entertainment elsewhere?
hddb52dd6g2b20g49b0gb17ag51f59f828281: Are you worried Shar won't approve?
h2fbc6d49gac0ag46daga179g9f679879eb60: Something like that. I was taught to reject anything that distracted from Shar...
hf2e0be3ag3423g4376gbb52gdd86a30d35ad: ... but there'll be time for penance later.
hfe9d1736g92e1g4b73g96f7gd6dd42a437ed: Don't get used to it. We just needed to clear the path forward.
had78e811g2abeg4a27ga99cg2576076d4845: How pragmatic. One would think letting the goblins torch the grove would have resulted in the same.
h34b60957gada5g4cffg9f66g975654a912a3: Sounds like the wine is talking.
h96f3899fgf62fg4eb1ga3b6gc70db3ffc251: It's not talking enough for my liking.
h0b8f95e8ge174g4b6bg91d9g0150a9c17725: I mean tieflings. Never gave them much thought. Certainly not that bunch in the grove.
hfeab2902g1169g4ac3g9f5eg6d5b5a1de5ad: I wouldn't quite say that... but no, that's not what I mean.
h019c3c0egf78ag40eag95dfg527692fe2aff: I think you'll find I've been showing ample concern for myself since the moment we met.
h167e35e9g3e90g4457g8a9fg4108abcbe47c: Tieflings. Never gave you all much thought. Certainly not that bunch in the grove.
h64f228a7g972eg4934g9684gb169364bd340: Tieflings. Never gave them much thought. Certainly not that bunch in the grove.
hec4faa9bgc23fg472egaf54gb69a73e2b6d8: I saw you with Astarion. You two looked... cosy.
h04d01b22gd881g4753gaf41g0fcb8abfe29c: Far be it from me to judge. Blood must still be running a little hot after everything.
hcd72ade8g91e0g4908g9a01g7d567a3b2961: I saw you with Gale. You two looked... cosy.
h6ac11d99g04b7g46a6gaa94g8ccdd30d1dbc: I saw you with Karlach. You two looked... cosy.
heed29d4ag2852g4cd2g922bgb219876adec1: I saw you with Lae'zel. You two looked... cosy.
hcf23e93dgf644g4cf3gbb36g9aa88bb5eaa3: I saw you with Wyll. You two looked... cosy.
